# PERF-75 positive: db.Session constructed inside a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-075-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func ListUsers(c echo.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	tx := db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
	var users []User
	tx.Find(&users)
	return c.String(200, "ok")
}

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
}
